untranslatable_reason: This signal requires option-specific logic (call position with unrealized gain, put purchase at specific strike spread, liquidation after calendar date) that cannot be expressed using the available equity/futures technical indicators. The strategy involves: (1) detecting an existing call position with unrealized gain (requires portfolio/options state), (2) executing a calendar spread across option strikes (requires options chain data and strike price relationships), (3) triggering exit based on calendar date, not price/technical conditions. The allowed indicators are exclusively price-action and momentum-based and do not support options position state, strike price deltas, or calendar-based logic.
translation_notes: Signal is a tax-deferral strategy using options collar (long call + short put spread). Requires position-level state tracking, options Greeks, strike price relationships, and calendar date logic—none of which are available in the technical indicator set. This is structurally incompatible with a price-based backtest engine.
